ac back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/SeisFront#A

has super-classes
building component c, fragility category c
has sub-classes
a10 c, a20 c, below ground c, foundation c

a10c back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/SeisFront#A10

has super-classes
a c

a20c back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/SeisFront#A20

has super-classes
a c

above groundc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/BuildingComponents#AboveGround

has super-classes
building component c
has sub-classes
exterior component c, superstructure component c

air compressorc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/product#AirCompressor

has super-classes
air distribution component c
has sub-classes
d3032 c

air distribution componentc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/BuildingComponents#AirDistributionComponent

has super-classes
mep component c
has sub-classes
air compressor c, air handling unit c, d304 c, difusser c, ducting c, fan c, variable air volume box c

air handling unitc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/product#AirHandlingUnit

has super-classes
air distribution component c
has sub-classes
d305 c, d3052 c

annealed glass panelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/product#AnnealedGlassPanel

has super-classes
glass panel c

areac back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.ontology-of-units-of-measure.org/resource/om-2/subset#Area

has super-classes
quantity c
has sub-classes
horizontal area c, vertical side area c

area unitc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.ontology-of-units-of-measure.org/resource/om-2/subset#AreaUnit

has super-classes
unit c
has sub-classes
prefixed are c, square prefixed metre c

bc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/utoronto/ontologies/SeisFront#B

has super-classes
building component c, fragility category c, vulnerable component c

b10 c, b20 c, b30 c
